title: Complexity-aware AI output + closet scroll/highlight
description: Recommendation mode now enforces explicit format/tone per level (Simple=1 sentence, Pro=full Markdown). Closet item links scroll to and highlight the item on /closet.

title: Hamburger nav on all pages, Changelog CMS
description: Shared HamburgerNav replaces all back buttons on Settings, Security, and Privacy Hub. Dev changelog CMS supports create/edit/delete via API.

title: Fix preview auth redirect via AUTH_URL override
description: auth.ts now overrides AUTH_URL with VERCEL_URL on preview deployments so NextAuth resolves redirectTo against the preview domain, not production.

title: Fix preview deployments redirecting to production dashboard
description: signIn() calls now use host-derived absolute redirectTo URLs so preview deployments stay on their own domain instead of bouncing to what2wear-two.vercel.app.

title: Fix checkSupabase unconfigured detection
description: checkSupabase() now returns status: unconfigured when env vars are missing, instead of throwing and reporting status: error.

title: Health Panel + System Diagnostics + UX Hardening (SKY-3)
description: Live health panel for dev center (Weather/AI/Supabase status + latency). Session diagnostics in dev dashboard. Follow-up limit UI hardening.

title: Runtime crash stability fix (SKY-1E)
description: Guard formatSlotTime against empty/malformed time inputs (m.toString crash). Defensive null guards in closet-link regex and renderOutfitWithClosetLinks.

title: Export cooldown system (SKY-1D)
description: Add 12-hour localStorage-based cooldown after data export for regular users. Dev users bypass the cooldown. Countdown displayed in Privacy Hub.

title: Polish & performance pass (SKY-1C)
description: Smooth CSS collapse animation on planning panel, hydration flash fix, memoized closet-link regex, whitespace-pre-line on outfit text, and code clarity improvements.

title: AI planning integration, closet links, BYOK Gemini, Pro prompt
description: Inject weather planning data (time slots + complexity) into AI prompts, render closet items as links in outfit text, add /closet page with lock at <15 items, BYOK Gemini support, and Pro client-side custom prompt.

title: Weather Planning UI panel
description: Added a collapsible Weather Planning panel above location input with time slots, per-slot environment types, indoor temperature inputs, and a recommendation complexity slider.

title: Sky Style docs launch and theming
description: Set up apps/docs as a standalone Vercel project, replaced starter content with Sky Style docs, archived the original templates, and applied a custom Sky Style visual theme.

title: Fix Vercel Next.js detection for apps/web
description: Added apps/web package.json and lockfile so Vercel can detect Next.js when Root Directory is set to apps/web.

title: Monorepo architecture for web, docs, and API
description: Reorganized the repo into apps/web and apps/docs, added an apps/api placeholder, and updated scripts/config docs to preserve current behavior while preparing multi-project deployment.

title: README refresh with screenshots
description: Updated plan limits in README to match current server behavior and added a screenshots section using docs/images assets.

title: Security & Privacy UI embedded in Account page
description: MFA/2FA, Passkeys, Security Audit Log, Data Export, and Account Deletion sections now appear directly on the Account page.

title: Interface & Content Update
description: Public Markdown Devlog, Apple-Style CSS UI, Intelligent State-Aware Navigation, and flattened Dev Center routing (/dev/triage, /dev/chat, /dev/health, /dev/changelog).

title: Privacy and Security Update
description: Passkeys (WebAuthn), Stacked MFA with TOTP & recovery codes, Session Management, Security Audit Log, Data Sovereignty Hub, CSS-only Apple toggles, and Dev Command Center.

title: Server-side rate limiting on feedback submissions
description: Added 10-minute server-side rate limiting to feedback entries for security and data integrity. UI shows a plan-colored alert and live countdown timer.

title: Multi-point feedback ecosystem with Simple Mode reactivity
description: Integrated multi-point feedback ecosystem with Simple Mode reactivity and plan-based styling. Includes /feedback route, modal, footer link, outfit card hook, and Settings card.

title: Fix missing whitespace between bold and regular text
description: Added explicit {" "} JSX whitespace around all inline <strong> elements in legal docs and the upgrade modal; removed incorrect CSS letter-spacing workaround; reverted visual spacing overrides.

title: WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility refactor + text spacing fixes
description: Skip link, semantic landmarks (main/nav/footer), aria-labels, focus-visible ring, sr-only class, aria-hidden decorations, role=alert/status, aria-expanded/pressed, accessible tables, drag divider keyboard support, and improved text spacing around bold elements.

title: Tiered UI gradients, quadrupled credits, multi-stage fetch
description: Tiered UI gradients per plan (free/pro/dev), quadrupled free & pro credits, refactored multi-stage weather/AI fetching workflow with intermediate state and slide-up reveal animation.

title: BYOK localStorage + gender persistence + legal doc updates
description: Fixed gender preference to persist in localStorage. Added BYOK API key UI for Pro/Dev users stored locally only. Updated Privacy Policy and Terms of Service to accurately reflect local-only storage.

title: Fix broken Markdown table in README
description: Removed extra pipe from the Plans table separator row so the table renders correctly on GitHub (header had 3 columns, separator had 4).

title: Fix Demo Access functional bypass & environment gating
description: Tightened demo login to only allow VERCEL_ENV=preview or NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_PREVIEW=true. Updated demo user identity (id, name, email). Button now hidden by default outside preview.

title: Fix build error & add AI changelog instructions
description: Fixed TypeScript TS2322 error in the style API route by casting Supabase settings fields to string | undefined. Added AGENTS.md and .github/copilot-instructions.md so AI agents know to update changelog.json after every change.

title: Changelog & DX Integration
description: Added a GitHub-style changelog with vertical timeline on the homepage and settings. Implemented demo login for preview environments with 10× free-tier limits. Added Simple Mode persistence via localStorage. Unread changelog indicators appear in the menu and footer until dismissed.

title: Legal Overhaul & Simple Mode
description: Rewrote Terms of Service and Privacy Policy with Plain-English summaries. Added a Simple Mode toggle that lets users switch between legalese and human-readable text. Legal pages now reflect the current payment model and data practices.

title: Payment & Subscription Pivot
description: Migrated billing to a credit-based model for Pro users (50 credits/week, auto-reset). Added Pay As You Go plan (coming soon). Improved account page to show live credit balance and usage stats.

title: Dashboard Layout Improvements
description: Added drag-to-resize column divider, extra side spacing toggle, and persistent layout mode preferences. Dashboard now listens for a skystyle-preferences-updated event so settings reflect instantly.

title: Sky Style — Public Launch
description: Initial public release. AI-powered outfit recommendations based on real-time multi-source weather data. Supports metric/imperial units, closet management, BYOK API keys for Pro users, and custom weather sources.
